note: Issue #164 211 runtime-only rollout evidence for the 17dc3ae runtime subject after PR #199. The live API/worker containers use ai-platform:17dc3ae-issue164-post-pr199-runtime-only-v1 with matching runtime subject, runtime source marker, OCI revision, and hyphen/underscore source-revision labels.
